blockingIssues.description: syncTags() does not deduplicate parsed keywords before inserting into article_tags, so duplicate keywords in one request can violate the composite PK and fail article create/update with a server error.
Feature handoff commit traceability is broken: the recorded commitId (486e557) is test-only and does not contain the implementation diff for the feature.

RichTextEditor uses dynamically constructed Tailwind min-height classes (`min-h-[${minHeight}]`), which are not reliably generated by static class extraction and can break the required taller full-description editor behavior.
PUT /api/admin/categories/:id accepts decimal order values and truncates with Math.trunc instead of rejecting non-integer input, violating VAL-CAT-026.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the optional UPLOADS_DIR environment variable in .factory/library/environment.md for attachment storage override behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax or branch the strict procedure for backend-only and UI-only increments (tests-first ordering and mandatory agent-browser steps), or require explicit handoff deviations when not followed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reports for articles-crud-api, categories-crud-api, articles-admin-form, and categories-admin-ui all flagged the same mismatch between SKILL.md procedure and actual successful execution patterns.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require handoffs to preserve feature-to-commit traceability when a worker makes multiple commits (e.g., include both implementation commit and final commit or an array of commit IDs).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: articles-admin-form handoff recorded commit 486e557 (test-only), while implementation was in b68d621, causing scrutiny traceability loss.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated fullstack-worker procedure mismatch observations from multiple review reports.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate (captured once as a systemic suggested guidance update)

rejectedObservations.observation: Add categories parity note to library based on ad hoc legacy lookups.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous (observation did not provide concrete, stable rule text to add without re-researching legacy sources)
